name: Retail Express - Login Changes
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "As part of our ongoing Maropost Unified Login initiative, we're rolling out a refreshed login experience for Back Office. This marks the first step toward a more streamlined and secure login process across Maropost platforms."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "What's Changing:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You'll notice a "}, {"text": "new look and feel", "bold": true}, {"text": " during login."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "password field is no longer visible initially", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "After entering your "}, {"text": "User ID", "bold": true}, {"text": " and clicking "}, {"text": "Login", "bold": true}, {"text": ", you'll be redirected to a "}, {"text": "Maropost-branded interim page", "bold": true}, {"text": " where you'll enter your full credentials before being taken to Back Office."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "This redirect is "}, {"text": "expected and part of the new login flow", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Why It Matters:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "This update lays the foundation for future enhancements, including "}, {"text": "multi-factor authentication", "bold": true}, {"text": " and unified access across Maropost products."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "What You Need to Do:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Continue logging in as normal-no changes to your credentials or process."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If you see the Maropost-branded page during login, rest assured it's part of the new experience. There is a screenshot below of the pages, so you'll know what to expect."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Stay tuned for further updates as we continue improving your login experience."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express Back Office Login Page:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/4CGYRURC1EAL/image.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/4CGYRURC1EAL/image.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image.png", "width": 2176, "height": 1336}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Maropost Branded Page:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/66FHM08MMSYA/image.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/66FHM08MMSYA/image.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image.png", "width": 2013, "height": 1255}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
